title: HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON AND PARENTS AS TEACHERS - 211info
text: FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON AND PARENTS AS TEACHERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Healthy Families Oregon and Parents As Teachers (PAT) programs provide information about a child’s growth, and what to expect from each stage of development. 401 S Canyon Boulevard John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Healthy Families Oregon: Low-income households Parents As Teachers (PAT): Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 575-1006 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 575-1006 Main phone (541) 620-7114 FAX Main phone (541) 575-1006 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Grant and Harney Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Child Abuse Prevention Home Based Parenting Education Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - BABY STEPS BIRTH AND BEYOND PRENATAL EDUCATION HUMAN REPRODUCTION - GRANT COUNTY LACTATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN IN BETWEEN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES AND RESOURCE LIBRARY PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER
